prompt.prompt: See prompt.md — paste your customized prompt here

agent.first_message: Good morning, thanks for calling [Company]. Who am I speaking with?

tools.name: transfer_to_department
tools.description: Transfer the caller to a specific department or person. Use after confirming the caller's intent and the correct destination.

transfer.message: Let me transfer you now. One moment please.

tools.name: check_hours
tools.description: Check business hours, holiday schedules, or department availability for the current day.

department.description: The department to check hours for

tools.name: take_message
tools.description: Record a message for a person or department when they are unavailable. Creates a message record that will be delivered.

for_person.description: The name of the person the message is for

for_department.description: The department the message is for

caller_name.description: Name of the person leaving the message

caller_company.description: Company of the person leaving the message

tools.name: end_call
tools.description: End the call after the caller has been helped, transferred, or left a message.

evaluation_criteria.name: Caller Identified
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent identified who is calling and the purpose of their call.

evaluation_criteria.name: Routed Correctly
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent transferred to the correct department or took an appropriate message.

evaluation_criteria.name: Professional Tone
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent maintained a polished, professional front-desk demeanor throughout.

caller_company.description: Company or organization the caller represents

reason_for_call.description: Brief summary of why the caller is calling

department_requested.description: Which department or person the caller wants to reach

message_content.description: Content of any message left by the caller
